rows.name: TWSE OpenAPI
rows.decision_use: Daily price, volume, institutional and market data should prefer official TWSE/TPEx endpoints before third-party fallbacks.
rows.score_use: Allowed to affect core score when freshness and schema checks pass.

rows.name: Tide Taiwan Market Dashboard
rows.decision_use: Convert market breadth and heat into position-control guardrails.
rows.score_use: Allowed to adjust action labels and position stance, not raw stock score.

rows.name: TWSE/TPEx Industry Value Chain
rows.decision_use: Use as the baseline map for upstream, component, assembly and downstream relationships.
rows.score_use: Internal theme confidence only; do not create a buy signal by itself.

rows.name: StatementDog Market Trend
rows.decision_use: Cross-check concept stocks and supply-chain labels when a topic suddenly heats up.
rows.score_use: Can raise theme confidence only when confirmed by price-volume and revenue evidence.

rows.name: backtesting.py
rows.decision_use: Useful for readable single-strategy entry/exit experiments.
rows.score_use: Can validate trade-plan rules, not daily live data.

rows.name: QuantStats
rows.decision_use: Useful for drawdown, monthly return and risk-adjusted performance reports.

rows.name: twstock Python Library
rows.decision_use: Potential local fallback for Taiwan stock quote/history utilities.
rows.score_use: No scoring impact until adapter tests and freshness checks pass.

rows.name: vectorbt
rows.decision_use: Useful for fast vectorized factor research across many stocks.
rows.score_use: Can inform future thresholds only after reproducible local backtests.

rows.name: AI Stock Map
rows.decision_use: Use for comparing industry-chain structure and missing concept clusters.
rows.score_use: Research backlog only until mappings are manually verified.
